use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING TESTOSTERONE DEFICIENCY IN MEN
TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE

indications.text:
JATENZO (testosterone undecanoate) is an androgen indicated for testosterone replacement
therapy in adult males for conditions associated with a deficiency or absence of endogenous
testosterone:
 Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to cryptorchidism,
bilateral tors...
